title: Toggleable Pie Chart
description: This Minecraft mod lets you toggle the debug pie chart with the "O" key without showing coordinates, giving you cleaner performance stats. Pressing the "P" key allows you to move the pie chart anywhere on your screen for a customizable HUD experience.
body:
This is a client-side Minecraft mod that lets you open Minecraft’s built-in pie chart overlay without opening the full F3 debug menu.

Press O to open and close the pie chart overlay instantly
Press P to move and reposition the chart anywhere on your screen
Clean and lightweight interface
Works on any server without needing server installation

Perfect for players who want quick access to performance and debug information without cluttering their screen with the entire debug menu.
